phase2_design_plan.approach: additive pilot alias only; preserve legacy ScarFLIX_part-* until verified

phase3_pilot_gate.reason: Fresh locked baseline regressed from Stage A 83/105 visible to 74/105 visible before any structural mutation. Existing Stage B plan also records prior live symlink/file path mechanics timeout and no dedicated protected migration runner is present.
phase3_pilot_gate.safety_decision: Do not create aliases, edit webdav_map.json, move folders, create symlinks, or trigger Plex refresh until a protected pilot runner exists and current visibility stabilizes.
required_before_retry: Create dedicated protected Path 2 pilot migration runner with backup, additive-only mutation, per-title rollback, and read-only pre/post verification.
Run two consecutive fresh uncapped baselines showing stable or improving visibility, or explicitly accept the lower 74/105 baseline as the migration reference after Grok/Jason architecture approval.
Use only 3-5 visible titles and no publication/expansion; keep PAUSE_PUBLICATION active.

recommendation.next_action: Implement a dedicated protected Path 2 pilot migration runner, then retry only after a stable baseline gate. Do not manually mutate paths or webdav_map.json from Codex inline.
recommendation.escalation: Grok peer review recommended for accepting 74/105 as reference or authorizing protected pilot despite visibility drift.
